programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Phyllis is troubled by Nick's behavior; Matt Clark resurfaces in Genoa City; Cane makes a promise to Lily.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Hope encourages Brooke to fight for what she deserves at Forrester Creations; Carter warns Ridge and Steffy about the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Kat challenges Bill; Joey assigns Randy an urgent task; Vanessa has a business proposition for Hayley; Lia's threats chill Grayson; Jacob worries a dangerous trap has been set.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Single Mom ... Married Boyfriend!; Cheating on Facebook?
programme.desc: A single mother says she lent thousands of dollars to a man who says they were never intimate; a woman's cheating boyfriend accuses her of stealing his property.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Twin Girls Repoed Ride!; Mangled Motorcycle Mix-Up!; Ex-Fiance Crash!
programme.desc: A man co-signs a loan for his grandchildren's father, and his favor is returned with nonpayment and a repo; a friend totals an imprisoned man's motorcycle and is seriously injured; a woman sues her ex-fiance for crashing her car and injuring her.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A friendly loan turns into radio silence and rage; a woman says she was ghosted after lending her former friend cash, but the borrower fires back, accusing her of harassment and making threats; this is a deal that proves short loans can have long memories.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A substitute schoolteacher sues her former student and his mother, who she says were great landlords for years -- until they started harassing her; the son says he felt the need to pepper spray her in self-defense.

programme.desc: Evening news coverage.

programme.sub-title: A Little Schmoozin' and a Nose for the News

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When an emotion-driven decision puts Woodstone at risk, Sam and Jay step up to defend what they've built; Isaac struggles to adjust to new surroundings, only to realize that some connections are too important to leave behind.

programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: When an ambitious filmmaker dies in a suspicious cleaning accident, Elsbeth focuses on the subject of her final documentary.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Steffy becomes more frustrated with Hope and her line; Donna is worried that Katie is destroying the family.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Nicole and Carlton run into special guest Sunny Anderson; Dani and Andre's imaginations run wild; Grayson makes a life-changing deal; Smitty learns critical intel; Ted and Shanice continue to clash over Leslie; Martin catches up with his cousin.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Beloved Car Trashed by Ex!; Tire Kicking or Car Whipping?
programme.desc: Ending a rocky relationship, a woman is accused of throwing things at her ex's vehicle; a man denies vandalizing a co-worker's car.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Ungrateful Aunt's Trailer Trash?; Lesbian Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: After her niece lets her live in her home rent-free for many years, an aunt sues her for destroying an old mobile home; a woman demands the return of an engagement ring, but her ex says it was a gift.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A neighborly favor turns into a storage scandal; a woman says that, after helping her move, a neighbor sold her belongings and owes reimbursement; he argues that she abandoned a single dryer and never paid moving fees; sometimes helpful hands turn into hardened opponents.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A homeowner says his contractor dropped the ball on getting permits, and now there are engineers who have been paid but can't do anything: he wants his money back in full.

programme.title: Sheriff Country
programme.desc: A dramatic federal crackdown rocks Edgewater and forces Sheriff Mickey Fox to confront a sprawling investigation that pits loyalty to her community against the reach of the DEA.

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: When Bode's past resurfaces far from Edgewater, a volatile chain of events leads to a perilous off-duty rescue that forces him to confront guilt, accountability and what it truly means to step up when lives -- and friendships -- are on the line.

programme.title: Boston Blue
programme.desc: When a college basketball star is threatened, Danny and Lena race to protect them while solving a murder; deeply personal conflicts and moral dilemmas surface, forcing the team to confront difficult truths about loyalty, identity and justice.
